entities.description: A perennial wild species used as the male parent for chickpea improvement

entities.description: The research institution where the experiments were conducted

entities.name: EMASCULATION
entities.description: The process of removing anthers from the flower to prevent self-pollination

entities.name: POLLINATION
entities.description: The process of transferring pollen to the stigma

entities.name: GROWTH REGULATORS
entities.description: An aqueous mixture of hormones applied to pollinated pistils to promote development

entities.name: GIBBERELLIC ACID
entities.description: A plant hormone used as a component of the growth regulator mixture

entities.name: NAA
entities.description: Naphthaleneacetic acid, a plant hormone used as a component of the growth regulator mixture

entities.name: KINETIN
entities.description: A cytokinin plant hormone used as a component of the growth regulator mixture

entities.name: LIGHT MICROSCOPY
entities.description: A technique used to study pollen germination on the stigma

entities.name: FLUORESCENT MICROSCOPY
entities.description: A technique used to study pollen germination on the stigma

entities.name: POLLEN GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of pollen grains sprouting on the stigma

entities.name: POD INITIALS
entities.description: The earliest stage of pod development observed after pollination

entities.name: OVULE GROWTH
entities.description: The development of ovules within the pod

entities.name: GLOBULAR EMBRYOS
entities.description: A specific stage of embryo development observed in the ovules
